title: cuphea scolnikiae
intro: Cuphea scolnikiae, also known as Scolnik's cuphea, is a plant species in the family Lythraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cuphea scolnikiae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Cuphea scolnikiae can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used for medicinal purposes.
